prompt_templates.请将以下内容进行10: Please summarize the content below, keep key information, present in bullet points, ensure easy quick reading.
prompt_templates.你是一位精通中英11: You are a master Chinese-English translator. Please translate the content below into natural, smooth Chinese that fits the context, keeping original technical terms and tone.
prompt_templates.请详细分析以下代12: Please analyze the code logic below in detail, find potential bugs, memory leaks or security issues, and provide optimization and readability improvement suggestions.
prompt_templates.请根据我提供的本13: Please organize this week's work items into a logical, focused weekly report including: this week's progress, issues encountered, next week's plan.
prompt_templates.请根据以下主题和14: Please write a well-structured, logical article based on the theme and keywords. Requirements: engaging opening, in-depth discussion, elevated conclusion. Theme: [Please fill], Keywords: [Please fill], Style: [Professional/Casual/Creative]
prompt_templates.请根据以下产品服15: Please generate 5 marketing copies in different styles based on the product/service: 1 professional, 1 casual, 1 creative, 1 emotional, 1 concise. Product/Service: [Please describe]
prompt_templates.请为以下内容生成16: Please generate social media copies for different platforms: WeChat (in-depth, valuable), Xiaohongshu (engaging, attractive), Weibo (short, topical), Douyin (colloquial, rhythmic). Theme: [Please fill]
prompt_templates.请为以下内容生成17: Please generate 10 eye-catching titles including: suspense, numerical, question, comparison, emotional types. Content Theme: [Please fill]
prompt_templates.请围绕以下主题提18: Please provide 5 creative ideas or solutions around the theme, with novel angles, practical feasibility, and brief recommendation reasons.
prompt_templates.请对以下观点或事19: Please deeply analyze the viewpoint or event, analyzing root causes, influencing factors, stakeholder dynamics, and possible future trends.

introduce_popup.Upgrade system to increase computing pow: Upgrade system to increase computing power, recharge/course activation/service activation discount
introduce_popup.升级系统增加算力: 升级系统增加算力充值/课程开通/服务开通折扣

introduce_popup_operator.Company headquarters settlement and offl: Company headquarters settlement and offline learning opportunities
introduce_popup_operator.公司总部入驻及线: 公司总部入驻及线下学习实操机会

learn_a_i.AI question generation feature is so pow: AI question generation feature is so powerful, what used to take 3 days to complete now takes 10 minutes, and the question quality is high.
learn_a_i.Enterprise training system's smart Q&A f: Enterprise training system's smart Q&A feature solved our major pain points, employees can ask AI anytime, no need to wait for human replies.
learn_a_i.Knowledge graph feature makes learning p: Knowledge graph feature makes learning paths clearer, students can see their knowledge gaps, learning effectiveness improved significantly.
learn_a_i.AI智能出题功能50: The AI smart question generation feature is incredibly powerful. Test papers that used to take 3 days to complete can now be generated in 10 minutes, and the question quality is excellent.
learn_a_i.企业培训系统的智51: The smart Q&A feature of the enterprise training system solved a major pain point for us. Employees can ask AI anytime they encounter problems, no longer needing to wait for manual replies.
learn_a_i.知识图谱功能让学52: The knowledge graph feature makes learning paths clearer. Learners can see their knowledge blind spots, and learning effectiveness has significantly improved.
